suite.name: Amazon

test.name: User must sign in to check out

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: The chromedriver version (144.0.7559.96) detected in PATH at /usr/local/bin/chromedriver might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (145.0.7632.116); currently, chromedriver 145.0.7632.117 is recommended for chrome 145.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Position
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: #0 0x5aec166e6afa <unknown> #1 0x5aec16100300 <unknown> #2 0x5aec16146a71 <unknown> #3 0x5aec1617c076 <unknown> #4 0x5aec1617685c <unknown> #5 0x5aec16175b39 <unknown> #6 0x5aec160c5785 <unknown> #7 0x5aec166ac689 <unknown> #8 0x5aec166af581 <unknown> #9 0x5aec16698ca9 <unknown> #10 0x5aec166b013e <unknown> #11 0x5aec1667f3a0 <unknown> #12 0x5aec160c2e64 <unknown> #13 0x7adff962a1ca <unknown> #14 0x7adff962a28b __libc_start_main #15 0x5aec160819aa _start

InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: not connected to DevTools (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.116); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: #0 0x5aec166e6afa <unknown> #1 0x5aec1610060f <unknown> #2 0x5aec160e63a3 <unknown> #3 0x5aec1610f871 <unknown> #4 0x5aec16184a80 <unknown> #5 0x5aec1619e028 <unknown> #6 0x5aec16147842 <unknown> #7 0x5aec16148631 <unknown> #8 0x5aec166ac689 <unknown> #9 0x5aec166af581 <unknown> #10 0x5aec16698ca9 <unknown> #11 0x5aec166b013e <unknown> #12 0x5aec1667f3a0 <unknown> #13 0x5aec166d3fc8 <unknown> #14 0x5aec166d419b <unknown> #15 0x5aec166e5e68 <unknown> #16 0x7adff969caa4 <unknown> #17 0x7adff9729c6c <unknown>
kw.doc: Sets window position using ``x`` and ``y`` coordinates.
kw.status: InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: not connected to DevTools (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.116); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: #0 0x5aec166e6afa <unknown> #1 0x5aec1610060f <unknown> #2 0x5aec160e63a3 <unknown> #3 0x5aec1610f871 <unknown> #4 0x5aec16184a80 <unknown> #5 0x5aec1619e028 <unknown> #6 0x5aec16147842 <unknown> #7 0x5aec16148631 <unknown> #8 0x5aec166ac689 <unknown> #9 0x5aec166af581 <unknown> #10 0x5aec16698ca9 <unknown> #11 0x5aec166b013e <unknown> #12 0x5aec1667f3a0 <unknown> #13 0x5aec166d3fc8 <unknown> #14 0x5aec166d419b <unknown> #15 0x5aec166e5e68 <unknown> #16 0x7adff969caa4 <unknown> #17 0x7adff9729c6c <unknown>

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

test.doc: This is some basic info about the test
test.status: InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id: session deleted as the browser has closed the connection from disconnected: not connected to DevTools (Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.116); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: #0 0x5aec166e6afa <unknown> #1 0x5aec1610060f <unknown> #2 0x5aec160e63a3 <unknown> #3 0x5aec1610f871 <unknown> #4 0x5aec16184a80 <unknown> #5 0x5aec1619e028 <unknown> #6 0x5aec16147842 <unknown> #7 0x5aec16148631 <unknown> #8 0x5aec166ac689 <unknown> #9 0x5aec166af581 <unknown> #10 0x5aec16698ca9 <unknown> #11 0x5aec166b013e <unknown> #12 0x5aec1667f3a0 <unknown> #13 0x5aec166d3fc8 <unknown> #14 0x5aec166d419b <unknown> #15 0x5aec166e5e68 <unknown> #16 0x7adff969caa4 <unknown> #17 0x7adff9729c6c <unknown>

suite.doc: This is some basic info about the whole suite

errors.msg: The chromedriver version (144.0.7559.96) detected in PATH at /usr/local/bin/chromedriver might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (145.0.7632.116); currently, chromedriver 145.0.7632.117 is recommended for chrome 145.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
